chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D-3115 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For order as to non-prosecution. -------------- 22.08.2024. Mr. Arshad Shahzad, Advocate for Petitioner. ********* Matter has come up for non-prosecution; whereas, ad-interim order has been passed on 25.06.2024 and as per office note certified copy of the order has been obtained; whereby, the Respondents have been restrained from taking coercive measures. Such conduct on the part of the Petitioner cannot be appreciated; therefore, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
